description_long: This object is a rectangular concrete barrier with a slightly tapered profile, commonly used for access control in urban environments. The surface is rough and weathered, with visible signs of wear and discoloration, especially in the central section. The ends of the barrier are darker, possibly due to reinforced material or accumulated grime, while the middle section is lighter and more worn. The top and bottom edges are straight and flat, with a subtle step near the base, providing additional stability. The object is solid and heavy, designed to prevent vehicles or pedestrians from passing through restricted areas. There are no visible openings, connectors, or decorative elements, emphasizing its utilitarian function.
description: A solid, rectangular concrete barrier with a rough, weathered surface and darker ends, used for access control in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the barrier, with lighter central section and darker ends.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the tapered profile and thickness of the barrier.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the same color pattern and surface wear.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the taper and thickness of the barrier.
